name: callguard
description: CallGuard AI — live AI compliance scoring for every sales conversation. Smarter calls, safer business.

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=packages/shared && npm run build --workspace=packages/api && npm run build --workspace=packages/web && npm run build --workspace=packages/admin-web
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace=packages/shared && npm run test --workspace=packages/api
